studyName: PROP Functional and Lymphocytic Markers of Respiratory Morbidity in Hyperoxic Preemies

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, postmenstrual age at time of rectal swab, and day of life at time of rectal swab, Z score of body weight at rectal swab, microbiome phase, read count, medications taken in the past week (n=6 variables; corticosteroid, motility, proton pump inhibitors, H2 receptor antagonists, diurectics, and antimicrobials), and nutrients consumed in the past week (n=11 variables; protein, lipid, total enteral calories, total calories, total carbohydrates, total lipids, total proteins, enteral calories, enteral carbohydrates, enteral lipids, and enteral proteins).

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: ANTIMICROBIAL_PW
variables.description: Whether antimicrobials were taken in the past week

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: CAL_RATIO
variables.description: Ratio of total enteral calories in the past week over total calories taken in the past week, per kg body weight

variables.name: CORTICOSTERIOD_PW
variables.description: Whether corticosteroids were taken in the past week

variables.name: DIURETIC_PW
variables.description: Whether a diuretic was taken in the past week

variables.name: ENTERAL_CAL_PW
variables.description: Enteral calories in the past week, per kg body weight

variables.name: ENTERAL_CARB_PW
variables.description: Enteral carbs taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: ENTERAL_LIPID_PW
variables.description: Enteral lipids taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: ENTERAL_PROTEIN_PW
variables.description: Enteral proteins taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: H2_RECEPTORY_ANTAGONIST_PW
variables.description: Whether H2 receptor antagonists were taken in the past week

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: MOTILITY_PW
variables.description: Whether motility agents were taken in the past week

variables.name: PERCENT_LIPID
variables.description: Ratio of total grams of lipid in the past week over total calories taken in the past week, per kg body weight

variables.name: PERCENT_PROTEIN
variables.description: Ratio of total grams of protein in the past week over total calories taken in the past week, per kg body weight

variables.name: PHASE
variables.description: Microbiome phase

variables.name: PROTON_PUMP_INHIBITORS_PW
variables.description: Whether proton pump inhibitors were taken in the past week

variables.name: READ_COUNT
variables.description: RNA read count

variables.name: RECTAL_CGA
variables.description: Postmenstrual age at time of rectal swab

variables.name: RECTAL_DOL
variables.description: Day of life at time of rectal swab

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: TOTAL_CAL_PW
variables.description: Total calories taken in the past week, per kg body weight

variables.name: TOTAL_CARB_PW
variables.description: Total carbs taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: TOTAL_LIPID_PW
variables.description: Total lipids taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: TOTAL_PROTEIN_PW
variables.description: Total proteins taken in the last week, per kg body weight

variables.name: WEIGHT_Z_SCORE
variables.description: Z score of body weight at time of rectal sample

tables.description: This subject phenotype data table includes the subject's sex, race, ethnicity, cohort assignment based on full term or pre-term at gestational birth, gestational age, birth weight and mode, day of life and diagnosis of NEC.

variables.name: Babies_with_NEC_Dx
variables.description: Confirmed diagnosis of necrotizing enterocolitis

variables.name: BirthMode
variables.description: Mode of Delivery

variables.name: BirthWeight
variables.description: Birth Weight

variables.name: Cohort
variables.description: Cohort assignment FullTerm  and PreTerm based upon gestational age at birth

variables.name: Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity

variables.name: GestationalAge
variables.description: Gestational Age at Birth

variables.name: NEC_Dx_DOL
variables.description: Day of life at Diagnosis of necrotizing enterocolitis

variables.name: Race
variables.description: Race

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique Identifier

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Subject sex

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate
